title: n8n Docker: Queue mode docker-compose
body:
version: '3.8'
services:
  n8n-main:
    image: n8nio/n8n:latest
    container_name: n8n-main
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "5678:5678"
    environment:
      - EXECUTIONS_MODE=queue
      - QUEUE_BULL_REDIS_HOST=redis
      - DB_TYPE=postgresdb
      - DB_POSTGRESDB_HOST=postgres
      - N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY={{encryption-key}}
    depends_on:
      - postgres
      - redis
  
  n8n-worker:
    image: n8nio/n8n:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    command: worker
    environment:
      - EXECUTIONS_MODE=queue
      - QUEUE_BULL_REDIS_HOST=redis
      - DB_TYPE=postgresdb
      - DB_POSTGRESDB_HOST=postgres
      - N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY={{encryption-key}}
    depends_on:
      - postgres
      - redis
  
  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    restart: unless-stopped
  
  postgres:
    image: postgres:16
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_DB=n8n
      - POSTGRES_USER=n8n
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD={{password}}
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data

volumes:
  postgres_data:
description: n8n queue mode with workers for horizontal scaling - production setup (docs.n8n.io/hosting/scaling/queue-mode/)
